transcript: Hi, this is Don LaVange with another Sunday Beer Club with your hosts Don and Dean and our special guests Ronnie and yeah, Jim. This is epic. Epic. Epic, dude. So anyway, we went up and found this new brewery in Salt Lake called the Epic Brewery. And they've got this elevated series of beer in the right-hand coolers. this is the brainless golden ale god it's good Jesus we're drinking it today with I can't smell it because I've got allergies I can smell a little bit. All I'm really getting is kind of yeasty. It's very delicious. Dean was glad that it's not too sweet. He doesn't like Belgians that are too sweet. We're having it with some nice aged gouda and Barolo sausage and some Chimay cheese don't forget that bacon oh and this delicious bacon candied bacon candied bacon from Ronnie Ronnie why do you do things like that anyway our toast is to Dave from Epic thank you Dave to Dave whoa oops
